description: An array of custom event objects to ingest
name: EventPayload

items.description: A custom event to record. Must include eventType. All other attributes are user-defined key-value pairs. Attribute names must not start with nr. (reserved). Values can be strings, numbers, or booleans.

eventType.description: The type of event. Used as the NRDB event table name. Must match the pattern [a-zA-Z0-9:_ ]+, max 255 characters.

timestamp.description: Unix epoch timestamp in seconds. If omitted, the current time is used. Cannot be more than 48 hours in the past or 24 hours in the future.
